author: woohyeonHeo
body:
#### PR description:
We update the ME0 L1Trigger emulator in CMSSW to the lastest version of firmware.
##### ME0 Trigger object producer
- Algorithm for ME0 Trigger: <https://ohm.bu.edu/~apeck/notes/algorithm.html>
- GEM DPG presentation: <https://indico.cern.ch/event/1704001/contributions/7166765/subcontributions/623097/attachments/3305616/5914448/ME0SF_CMSSW_wheo.pdf>
- The code is based on the existing python emulator (<https://github.com/andrewpeck/me0sf/blob/SW_optimizations/road/tb/>)
  + Its structure is designed to keep the same structure of the python emulator
- There is 2 version of EDProducer for this algorithm; one produce collections of "ME0Stub" (old version), and the other produce collections of "ME0TriggerDigi" (new version).
  - ME0TriggerDigi is existed data format class before the algorithm is implemented to CMSSW. It is competible class to the other firmware emulator in CMSSW.

#### PR validation:

- The code format has applied with `scram build code-format` and tested with `scram build code-checks`
- The output of the CMSSW code and the python emulator is identical
- The default process (e.g. reco, raw2digi, etc.) did not modified. Therefore, there is no change in running `runTheMatrix.py`
title: Update on ME0 L1Trigger algoritm
